title: cyperus refractus
intro: Cyperus refractus, also known as umbrella sedge or red spike-rush, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Cyperus refractus include its potential to aid in the treatment of various ailments, such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, due to its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Cyperus refractus can be used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being applied topically to the skin in the form of creams or ointments.
